sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72786" key="o)ktadaktuliai=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτα-δακτῠλῐαῖς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n72786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.71</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:23:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.23.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
